name: stage2-rvv-low-precision-contraction-primitive-surface-gate1
title: Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive surface campaign
description: Macro campaign for RVV low-precision contraction primitives; Gates 1-3 are complete and Gate 4 is active for Gearbox/resource-aware selected-body realization plus measured same-target comparison.
creator: codex
notes: Gates 1-3 are complete. Gate 4 primitive source/load/extension, widening-product role/policy facts, selected-dispatch no-win denial, packed-i4 low-shifted-product-rescale repair, evidence-root policy ingestion, resource-cost/admission decision consumption, high-nibble vwmacc schedule/resource repair, measured admission closure, local-repair frontier closure, beyond-local no-provider blocker, and the current beyond-local scalar-epilogue repair candidate now flow through Gearbox resource admission, selected-body realization/admission handoff, route metadata, target artifact mirrors, generated-bundle checks, same-target measurement records/evidence roots, production-pressure policy inputs, selected-dispatch policy evaluation, and direct measurement-outcome policy consumption. The current packed-i4 resource-cost contract is rvv-low-precision-packed-i4-resource-cost-contract.v1 with model high-nibble-vwmacc-loop-11-peak-live-5of32-scalar-epilogue-two-region-vsetvl.v1, loop-body steps 11, peak live vector groups 5/32, scalar-epilogue remediation decision accepted-beyond-local-scalar-epilogue-repair-candidate.v1, no-win admission decision deny-performance-preferred-with-beyond-local-scalar-epilogue-no-win-blocker, closure no-win-packed-i4-beyond-local-scalar-epilogue-loop-11-budget-5of32.v1, beyond-local contract rvv-low-precision-packed-i4-beyond-local-repair-admission.v1, beyond-local decision deny-performance-preferred-provider-scalar-epilogue-measured-no-win, beyond-local blocker packed-i4-beyond-local-scalar-epilogue-measured-no-win, and reopen requirement new-typed-provider-beyond-local-repair-plus-source-backed-measured-win-and-updated-admission-facts.v1. Fresh ssh rvv timing was collected because generated post-loop runtime behavior changed to scalar dequant/clamp/store: dequant remains no-win with best speedup range 0.895307..1.027027 and 12 summaries / 60 measurements / 12 correctness records, and dequant-clamp remains no-win with best speedup range 0.874735..1.061579 and 24 summaries / 120 measurements / 24 correctness records. Route support and correctness execution remain allowed through correctness-fallback; performance-preferred remains denied unless a later provider-owned beyond-local repair produces source-backed measured-win evidence and updates maturity, target mirrors, measurement roots, resource-cost admission, closure/reopen, beyond-local admission facts, and policy facts. Macro remains active for the next Gate 4 provider-owned schedule/resource repair beyond the scalar-epilogue repair plus fresh same-target timing, or a later campaign-level no-further-repair decision backed by new typed/provider facts.
